blocks.text: Get compressed, aggregate market trades. Market trades that fill in 100ms with the same price and the same taking side will have the quantity aggregated.
Retail Price Improvement(RPI) orders are aggregated and without special tags to be distinguished.

rows: ID to get aggregate trades from INCLUSIVE.
Timestamp in ms to get aggregate trades from INCLUSIVE.
Timestamp in ms to get aggregate trades until INCLUSIVE.

blocks.text: support querying futures trade histories that are not older than one year If both `startTime` and `endTime` are sent, time between `startTime` and `endTime` must be less than 1 hour. If `fromId`, `startTime`, and `endTime` are not sent, the most recent aggregate trades will be returned. Only market trades will be aggregated and returned, which means the insurance fund trades and ADL trades won't be aggregated. Sending both `startTime`/`endTime` and `fromId` might cause response timeout, please send either `fromId` or `startTime`/`endTime`

[
{
"a": 26129, // Aggregate tradeId
"p": "0.01633102", // Price
"q": "4.70443515", // Quantity
"f": 27781, // First tradeId
"l": 27781, // Last tradeId
"T": 1498793709153, // Timestamp
"m": true, // Was the buyer the maker?
}
]

If `fromId`, `startTime`, and `endTime` are not sent, the most recent aggregate trades will be returned. Only market trades will be aggregated and returned, which means the insurance fund trades and ADL trades won't be aggregated.
